news.headline: XTM offering C$7,000,000 in convertible debentures at C$1,100 per debenture with 12% interest rate and 24-month maturity.
news.summary: Toronto-based XTM INC. has announced a non-brokered private placement offering of convertible debentures priced at C$1,100 each, aiming to raise up to C$7,000,000 in total proceeds. The debentures will mature in 24 months, with an annual interest rate of 12%. Investors have the option to convert the debentures into debenture units at a conversion price of...

news.headline: Expensify (Nasdaq: EXFY) to announce Q3 results on Nov 7, 2024 after market close, with a call at 2pm PT / 5pm ET.
news.summary: Expensify, Inc., a payments superapp traded on Nasdaq under the ticker EXFY, is set to reveal its Q3 financial performance on November 7th, 2024, post-market closure. The company's call to delve into the Q3 results is scheduled for the same day at 2pm PT / 5pm ET. Expensify aids individuals and businesses globally in streamlining money management for expenses, corporate cards, and bills. More details on accessing the call will be provided on the day of the event.

news.headline: MACOM (Nasdaq: MTSI) to disclose Q4 and FY 2024 results ending Sep 27 on Nov 7, 2024, conducting a conference call at 8:30 am ET.
news.summary: Technology company MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: MTSI) based in Lowell, Mass., will reveal its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 which ended on September 27, 2024. These results will be presented before the market opens on Thursday, November 7, 2024. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time and will be led by Mr. Stephen G. Daly, President and CEO, along with Mr. John F. Kober, Senior VP.

news.headline: Visa partners with USAID to enhance global digital government access and systems. Collaboration aims for inclusivity.
news.summary: Visa has partnered with USAID to enhance accessibility of open, secure, and inclusive digital government systems globally.

news.headline: Marchex (NASDAQ: MCHX) to release Q3 2024 results on October 31, 2024, at 4:20 p.m. ET. AI-driven company focusing on revenue acceleration.
news.summary: Seattle-based company Marchex (NASDAQ: MCHX) is utilizing AI and conversational intelligence to boost operational effectiveness and revenue growth. The company is scheduled to report its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on October 31, 2024, at 4:20 p.m. ET. The press release will be available on Marchex's corporate website's Press Center section. Post-release, there will be a management discussion.

news.headline: Securonix partners with AVANT to deliver AI-reinforced CyberOps to global enterprises, expanding cybersecurity solutions.
news.summary: Securonix, Inc., a prominent in Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) technology, has joined forces with AVANT, a renowned Technology Services Distributor, to provide cutting-edge cybersecurity solutions. As a five-time Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader, Securonix's expertise will now be accessible to AVANT's vast network. This collaboration aims to empower organizations in combating the ever-changing cyber threats by leveraging advanced SIEM and AI-Reinforced technologies.

news.headline: Nintendo Switch Online introduces Banjo-Tooie for Nintendo 64; continues bear-bird duo adventures. #nintendoswitch
news.summary: In Redmond, Washington, a recent Nintendo Download released for Nintendo Switch Online + Expansion Pack features the launch of Banjo-Tooie for Nintendo 64 – Nintendo Switch Online library. In this game, Banjo and Kazooie face the revived evil witch Gruntilda and must work together to stop her. Filled with action, magical minigames, and challenging puzzles, this adventure follows the success of its predecessor. The expansion pack offers an array of new content to enhance the gaming experience.

news.headline: Sportradar wins two awards at 2024 American Gambling Awards: Betting Product of the Year for 4Sight technology and Data Service Provider of the Year.Produced by Gambling.com Group Limited.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Sportradar has been honored with two awards at the 2024 American Gambling Awards. The company was recognized for its 4Sight technology, winning the Betting Product of the Year award, and also received the Data Service Provider of the Year award. These accolades showcase Sportradar's significant impact on the sports betting industry. The American Gambling Awards are organized by Gambling.com Group Limited, a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol GAMB. This event celebrates leading companies and entities within the gambling sector.

news.headline: Sandbox VR partners with LOL Entertainment to open 4 new locations in East Coast cities - Baltimore, Boston, Philadelphia, and Washington DC.
news.summary: A partnership has been announced between Sandbox VR, a leading destination for high-quality location-based virtual reality experiences, and LOL Entertainment, a company known for creating immersive location-based entertainment. This collaboration will result in the establishment of four new Sandbox VR locations in key East Coast cities: Baltimore, Boston, Philadelphia, and Washington DC. This expansion is part of LOL Entertainment's strategy to invest in diverse location-based entertainment ventures, with Sandbox VR joining their portfolio of offerings.

news.headline: Wolters Kluwer tops all 6 quadrants in Chartis ALM Solutions Report, showing leadership in finance solutions.
news.summary: A global leader in professional information, software solutions, and services, Wolters Kluwer's Finance, Risk, and Regulatory Reporting (FRR) business has achieved top position in all six categories within the Chartis ALM Solutions 2024 Market Quadrants report. Chartis, providing independent research for banks, tech vendors, investment managers, and insurers, recognizes Wolters Kluwer's dominance in Asset Liability Management (ALM) solutions. This achievement reflects the company's dedication to excellence in the industry and its commitment to providing innovative and reliable products and services.

news.headline: ScienceLogic® recognized as 2024 Inc. Power Partner for second year in a row, among 359 companies, supporting entrepreneurs.
news.summary: RESTON, Virginia--ScienceLogic®, a prominent player in automated IT operations and observability, revealed today its inclusion in Inc.’s third annual Power Partner Award list. This reputable roster celebrates leading B2B entities nationwide with a demonstrated history of aiding entrepreneurs and fostering startup development. ScienceLogic secures a position on the list for the second consecutive year, alongside 359 firms spanning essential industry sectors such as health and wellness, and financial services.

news.headline: Michelob Ultra and Complex host celebrity golf event in Las Vegas, showcasing culture and music.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, a cultural golf renaissance is underway as Complex teams up with Michelob ULTRA to host an event where the biggest names in entertainment will gather. This collaboration, announced on October 24, 2024, signifies Complex's entry into the golf scene, known for its global culture and music lifestyle curation. This event is set to draw significant attention and participation from enthusiasts and industry leaders alike.

news.headline: Humana and Longevity Health expand access to Medicare Advantage Institutional Special Needs Plan in multi-state agreement.
news.summary: A new agreement between Humana and Longevity Health in multiple states will boost access to Humana Together in Health, a Medicare Advantage Institutional Special Needs Plan. The collaboration is set to benefit a significant number of individuals, providing them with improved healthcare access and specialized services.

news.headline: Vecna Robotics unveils CaseFlow™, streamlining case picking operations by automating 90% of warehouse travel and doubling worker throughput.
news.summary: In Waltham, MA, Vecna Robotics unveiled CaseFlowTM, a comprehensive solution for case picking operations. This innovative system incorporates pallet-handling robots for 90% of warehouse transportation, enhancing efficiency significantly. By implementing dynamic, directed zone picking, the solution boosts site performance by over 100%, simultaneously enhancing worker satisfaction and safety. Reports from Logistics Management and Warehouse & Distribution Science validate the efficacy of this approach.

news.headline: RGP's survey examines impact of interest rates on U.S. corporate investment decisions, shares macroeconomic insights.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, RGP published a fresh study on the influence of macroeconomic variables on workforce strategy choices among American firms.

news.headline: Transamerica partners with Fringe Benefit Group to enhance retirement plan solutions via The Contractors Plan, serving 1,500 employers with a $2 billion program.
news.summary: Today, in Baltimore, Transamerica revealed an extended partnership with Fringe Benefit Group (FBG) and The Contractors Plan, a prevailing wage retirement plan program worth $2 billion. This program manages retirement benefits for close to 1,500 employers, further solidifying the collaboration between the companies.

news.headline: Honda Aircraft Company receives Tier-6 Sustainable Flight Department Accreditation by NBAA, highest honor in flight category.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on October 24, 2024, Honda Aircraft Company received Tier-6 Sustainable Flight Department Accreditation from the National Business Aviation Association (NBAA) in the Flight category. This accreditation signifies the highest level of recognition, demonstrating Honda Aircraft Company's commitment to sustainability in aviation operations.

news.headline: NTT DATA to train 200,000 employees globally in Generative AI technology, aiming to develop 30,000 experts.
news.summary: In Tokyo today, NTT DATA revealed their Generative AI (GenAI) Talent Development Framework, aiming to enhance existing employee training programs. This global framework sets various levels of GenAI proficiency as a standard to swiftly build a proficient workforce. The structure is intended to assist in efficiently upskilling employees for clients to maximize GenAI benefits. This initiative emphasizes the company's commitment to nurturing skilled professionals.

news.headline: 28 universities implement Workday Student in 2024 for student success and career support with Illuminate AI.
news.summary: On October 24th, Iowa State University, Wake Forest University, and several other educational institutions implemented Workday Student to enhance student success and career opportunities. By utilizing Illuminate, the latest Workday AI technology, administrators can streamline their processes for improved productivity. This move signifies a step towards supporting students in achieving their academic and professional goals.

news.headline: DoiT earns AWS Cloud Operations Competency for Cloud Financial Management, offering comprehensive solutions in five key areas.
news.summary: DoiT, a leading global multicloud expert, based in Santa Clara, California, has recently attained the Amazon Web Services (AWS) Cloud Operations Competency. This achievement signifies that DoiT is among the select AWS Partners recognized for providing top-tier solutions in Cloud Operations. The competency covers all aspects including Cloud Financial Management and Cloud Gov, showcasing DoiT's expertise across the five key solution areas. This recognition highlights DoiT's commitment to delivering exceptional services to cloud-focused entities.

news.headline: Moors & Cabot launches new service model M&C Complete in Boston, enhancing client experiences. Established in 1890.
news.summary: A financial advisory firm in Boston, Moors & Cabot, established in 1890, is undergoing advancements to enhance services for its financial professionals and clients. The firm, rooted in the city for over a century, focuses on improving experiences.

news.headline: Sally Beauty introduces ion Luxe 8-In-1 Airstyler Pro, an all-in-one tool for hairstyling. Located in Denton, Texas.
news.summary: In Denton, Texas, on October 24, 2024, Sally Beauty introduced the ion Luxe 8-In-1 Airstyler Pro, a revolutionary all-in-one hairstyling tool. This new offering from ion aims to transform hairstyling for everyone. Sally Beauty, a top destination for professional hair color and care products, showcased this innovative tool.

news.headline: Maui Jim launches fishing sunglasses, Keha 663, on Oct 8. Features anti-fog tech, purpose for anglers.
news.summary: Peoria, Illinois - Maui Jim introduced its newest activity-specific sports styles, Keha 663 and Keha Asian Fit 664, on October 8. These sunglasses are designed for anglers, featuring an 8-base wrap made of Injected Nylon for durability. The lenses come with anti-fog features to ensure clear vision for freshwater and offshore fishing. The vent openings of the style contribute to its anti-fog capabilities.

news.headline: Reworld™ employees lead cleanup efforts for World Cleanup Day on Long Island with success, partnering with local communities in Huntington, Babylon, and Hempstead.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in Long Island, New York, Reworld™ collaborated with local residents to lead cleanup initiatives in the Town of Huntington, Babylon, and Hempstead in honor of National World Cleanup Day. The event saw a significant turnout of volunteers who played a key role in the success of the cleanup efforts.

news.headline: Minted collaborates with Petite Plume for holiday card collection, expanding design options for customers.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Minted, a leading design marketplace, revealed the release of a new holiday card collection in collaboration with high-end sleepwear brand Petite Plume.

news.headline: LG Ad Solutions joins Innovid's Harmony Initiative, increasing industry support.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, LG Ad Solutions has become the newest addition to Innovid's Harmony Initiative. This partnership brings together two prominent industry leaders to collaborate on innovative advertising solutions. The move is anticipated to strengthen LG Ad Solutions' position in the market and enhance their capabilities in reaching a wider audience. This strategic alliance signifies a significant milestone for both companies as they work towards driving growth and innovation in the advertising industry.

news.headline: Xponential Fitness to reveal Q3 2024 financials on November 7, 2024 after market close. Conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT / 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Xponential Fitness, a top franchisor of boutique health and wellness brands, disclosed plans to unveil its Q3 2024 financial results on November 7, 2024, post-market closure. This event will be followed by a conference call led by Xponential Fitness management at 1:30 p.m. PT / 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day, discussing these results. To join via phone, dial +1 (877) 407-9716 and use the conference ID provided. Stay tuned for insights into the performance of Xponential Fitness, listed on NYSE as XPOF.

news.headline: Movado Group releases 2024 Corporate Responsibility Report with progress on "Make Time" plan, ending January 31, 2024.
news.summary: Movado Group, Inc. (NYSE: MOV), based in Paramus, N.J., has recently released its 2024 Corporate Responsibility report, outlining the progress and evolution of its Corporate Responsibility program for the fiscal year ending January 31, 2024. The report highlights advancements made in alignment with the "Make Time" plan initiated in 2022. The plan focuses on enhancing employee engagement, evaluating environmental effects, and fostering future initiatives. This demonstrates Movado Group's commitment to sustainability and responsible business practices.

news.headline: HelloFresh partners with Warner Bros. to launch Rachel Green’s Trifle meal kits for FRIENDS fans, celebrating FRIENDS' 30th Anniversary.
news.summary: In New York, HelloFresh, a top meal kit company, has collaborated with Warner Bros. Discovery Global Consumer Products to introduce Rachel Green’s Trifle meal kits commemorating FRIENDS' 30th Anniversary. These kits are inspired by the beloved season six Thanksgiving episode. Available for this year's Friendsgiving or Thanksgiving celebrations, this special kit includes all the ingredients necessary to recreate the iconic Shepherd’s pie-meets-English Trifle dish.

news.headline: 56% of brands favor composable solutions as per MessageGears report indicating decline in popularity of pre-packaged CDPs.
"Stop political spam texts with SpamStrike app by Boston Venture Studio, protecting users from election spam. #2024election"
news.summary: Boston Venture Studio has recently launched SpamStrike, a free app designed to shield users from the barrage of unwanted political text messages inundating millions of Americans during the 2024 election season. This new tool aims to combat the relentless stream of political spam texts targeting voters from all affiliations. The Federal Communications Commission has been alerted to this widespread issue, which has long frustrated voters.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures fall due to 3 giants, while S&P 500 and Nasdaq rise. Tesla spikes, Boeing and IBM drag down Dow.
news.summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq are experiencing gains due to falling yields and a significant increase in Tesla's stock price. However, the Dow Jones is facing a decline primarily because of Boeing and IBM. The Dow Jones futures are dropping as three major companies struggle, while technology stocks are rising alongside Tesla's surge.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures drop after jobless claims; Tesla stock surges on earnings. Market reacts.
news.summary: Today in the stock market, there was a decline in Dow Jones futures during pre-market trading on Thursday following an unexpected increase in jobless claims. On the other hand, Tesla's stock saw a significant surge in response to their earnings report. This news has caused a stir in the market, with investors closely monitoring the developments. The Dow Jones futures dropped, highlighting the impact of the surprise jobless claims, while Tesla's stock performance stood out as it experienced notable growth. This dynamic shift in the market indicates a level of volatility and uncertainty that investors are navigating in light of these recent events.

news.headline: Local bank grows to become region's biggest.
Report focuses on smart building management, critical equipment, lighting, construction, facilities. Industry trends for industrial vertical are examined, aiding building industry participants.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Global Building Technologies and Services Growth Opportunities in the Industrial Vertical" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The study focuses on identifying key trends within the industrial vertical, which serves as an end-user vertical for building industry participants, and examines their influence on various segments within the industry. The industrial vertical pertains to manufacturing facilities encompassing manufacturing, production, or assembly processes. This report provides insights into significant growth opportunities within this sector.

news.headline: Brixton Biosciences gets $2M NIH grant for Neural Ice™, non-opioid pain relief drug. #Innovation #PainRelief
news.summary: Brixton Biosciences, a clinical-stage life sciences company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, has secured a grant from the NIH HEAL Initiative® to aid in the development and clinical progress of Neural Ice™. This innovative non-opioid, injectable solution is designed to provide durable pain relief. The grant, received on October 24, 2024, will support the advancement of Neural Ice™ and its potential impact on addressing pain management.

news.headline: El Tesoro introduces new tequila in Mundial Collection - Basil Hayden Toast Edition, celebrating craftsmanship.
news.summary: The Mundial Collection is honoring El Tesoro's legacy of craftsmanship by collaborating with esteemed distillers worldwide to introduce unique, scarce Tequilas. Recently announced in New York on October 24, 2024, El Tesoro de Don Felipe® Tequila, well-known for its quality, is part of this venture.

news.headline: Pine Gate Renewables secures $288M preferred equity financing from Blackstone Credit & Insurance for six solar projects.
news.summary: In Asheville, North Carolina, on October 24, 2024, Pine Gate Renewables, LLC, disclosed the finalization of a preferred equity investment worth $288 million with Blackstone Credit & Insurance. This investment will benefit six solar projects spanning across two states...

news.headline: Abbott starts first-of-its-kind TEAM-HF study to enhance outcomes in advanced heart failure patients, identifying those at risk.
news.summary: A groundbreaking study called TEAM-HF aims to enhance clinical results for patients experiencing deteriorating heart failure. The trial introduces innovative criteria to identify individuals at high risk of progressing to end-stage heart failure, potentially allowing for earlier access to life-saving treatments. This study marks a significant advancement in heart failure care, with the goal of improving outcomes for patients.

news.headline: Simpson Manufacturing Co., Inc. declares quarterly dividend on October 23, 2024. Company is listed on NYSE as SSD.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Simpson Manufacturing Co., Inc., a prominent company specializing in engineered structural connectors and building solutions, based in Pleasanton, California, made a significant declaration. The company's Board of Directors (NYSE: SSD) officially announced the decision.

news.headline: TrueCar (NASDAQ: TRUE) will announce Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 6 after market close, with a live call on Nov 7 at 9:00am ET in Santa Monica.
news.summary: A live call and webcast are scheduled for November 7 at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time in Santa Monica, California. TrueCar, Inc., listed as (NASDAQ: TRUE), will be disclosing their financial outcomes for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2024, on Wednesday, November 6, 2024, following the market closure.

news.headline: America's New Year's Celebration® returns with the 135th Tournament of Roses® Parade in Pasadena, California, broadcast commercial-free on January 1. Grand Marshal: Billie Jean King.
news.summary: The 135th Tournament of Roses® Parade will be aired live from Pasadena, California on January 1 without any commercial interruptions. The Grand Marshal for the parade will be the legendary sports star, broadcaster, and icon Billie Jean King. The announcement was made by Great American Media and the Pasadena Tournament of Roses® Association in New York on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: Agilis introduces PensionBuilder™ for retirement income with group pricing, addressing shift from defined benefit to DC plans.
news.summary: Enabling individuals to purchase lifetime income at discounted rates in order to establish a "personal pension" concept is gaining traction. This initiative comes in response to the transition of companies moving away from conventional defined benefit pension arrangements towards defined contribution (DC) plans like 401(k)s. This shift has led to a growing demand for strategies to secure long-term financial stability. The movement aims to address this pressing issue by providing participants with the opportunity to access group pricing, ensuring affordability and accessibility. The development is a significant step towards assisting individuals in securing their financial future amidst changing retirement landscapes.

news.headline: Cadrenal Therapeutics raises $5.1M through At-The-Market Facility for the development of tecarfarin.
news.summary: In Ponte Vedra, Florida, on October 24, 2024, Cadrenal Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: CVKD) announced their progress on tecarfarin, a novel vitamin K antagonist (VKA) aimed at providing improved chronic anticoagulation for patients. Cadrenal is a late-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to this development.

news.headline: AI startup Zencoder emerged from stealth mode to launch AI coding agents for developers, aiming to accelerate AI adoption.
news.summary: A tech startup based in Campbell, California, known as Zencoder, has recently unveiled its latest line of products aimed at offering innovative solutions to advance the adoption of artificial intelligence (AI). The company officially came out of stealth mode on October 24, 2024. Zencoder specializes in improving software development processes. Their recent product release signifies a significant step forward for the company as they aim to make a mark in the AI industry.

news.headline: Maria Sharapova and Bryan Brothers to be inducted into Tennis Hall of Fame in 2025, star-studded class.
news.summary: In Newport, Rhode Island on October 24, 2024, a star-studded class of 2025 will be celebrated over a weekend filled with special events for fans and tennis legends. Among them are renowned tennis player Maria Sharapova, who has won five singles major championships, and the American doubles duo Bob and Mike. The celebration will feature exciting new programming, promising an unforgettable experience for all involved.

news.headline: Locus Robotics opens cutting-edge headquarters in Wilmington, MA as they approach milestone of 4 billion picks.
news.summary: In Wilmington, MA, the state-of-the-art Locus Park facility is ushering in a new era of robotic innovation. On October 24, 2024, Locus Robotics, a leading company in AI-driven warehouse automation, celebrated the grand opening of its cutting-edge global facility. This marks a significant advancement in the industry, showcasing the latest in robotic technology. The location in Wilmington boasts top-notch amenities and is poised to drive advancements in the field.

news.headline: Retail Alliance Foundation launches as non-profit to reform gift card industry. Partnering with BFG Labs.
news.summary: In Grand Cayman on October 24, 2024, the Retail Alliance Foundation marked its official establishment as a non-profit group aimed at transforming the gift card and loyalty economy to be more transparent and fair. This initiative involves a collaboration with BFG Labs, a fully owned entity.

news.headline: Investment professionals worried about soaring US debt, unsustainable debt-to-GDP ratio, lacking policies from candidates.
news.summary: Experts in the financial industry are warning that the United States' debt-to-GDP ratio has reached unsustainable levels and remains unaddressed. Concerns are rising as neither of the current presidential candidates have put forth concrete plans to decrease the deficit. The nation's status as the global reserve currency may be at risk. This information was disclosed in New York on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: German Council of tax experts expect €3.4 bln less in tax revenues for federal government this year vs May forecast.
